1 → 2 → 3 → ... → 44 → 45

Each rule’s output feeds into the next, ensuring a coherent flow of gameplay mechanics from the initial setup through to endgame conditions. This chaining clarifies dependencies and interactions, enabling players to understand how early moves impact later possibilities.
